summary: OFFLINE SYNC BUG FIX VERIFIED - Testing of syncAllPendingChanges() function and handleOnline event handler. The fix correctly syncs ALL pending changes from ANY project when connection is restored. Found and fixed a minor bug: undefined getOfflineData() function in geometry fallback. Fixed dependency array issue where syncAllPendingChanges was missing.

bugs_fixed_during_test.issue: ReferenceError: getOfflineData is not defined - used undefined function instead of imported getGeometriasOffline
Missing syncAllPendingChanges in useEffect dependency array - handleOnline used syncAllPendingChanges but dependency was syncPendingChanges
bugs_fixed_during_test.fix: Changed dependency from syncPendingChanges to syncAllPendingChanges

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: syncAllPendingChanges() function (lines 152-245) correctly uses getCambiosPendientes(null) to get ALL changes without project filter
VERIFIED: handleOnline event (lines 385-401) calls syncAllPendingChanges(true) when connection is restored
VERIFIED: Clickeable badge (lines 4077-4097) calls syncAllPendingChanges when clicked and shows appropriate feedback
FIXED: getOfflineData was undefined - replaced with getGeometriasOffline (line 1029)
FIXED: useEffect dependency array now includes syncAllPendingChanges (line 418)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline sync functionality is working. When going online, handleOnline calls syncAllPendingChanges(null) to sync ALL pending changes regardless of current project. The pending badge at lines 4077-4097 is clickeable and triggers manual sync. Project visor URL: /dashboard/visor-actualizacion/{proyectoId}. Project ID for Sardinata: 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423

syncAllPendingChanges_function.details: Function at lines 152-245 correctly uses getCambiosPendientes(null) to get all pending changes without project filter

handleOnline_event.details: Event handler at lines 385-401 logs '[Offline] Conexión restaurada' and calls syncAllPendingChanges(true)

clickeable_pending_badge.details: Badge at lines 4077-4097 has onClick handler that calls syncAllPendingChanges(true)

offline_mode_detection.details: Yellow banner 'Modo offline - Solo datos previamente descargados' appears when browser goes offline

online_reconnection_sync.details: 'Sincronizando...' indicator appears when connection is restored

data_caching_for_offline.details: Data correctly cached: 3234 predios, 6076 geometrias, 6912 construcciones

console_log_evidence: [PWA] Conexión restaurada - PWA service worker detected connection restore
[OfflineDB] 3234 predios guardados para proyecto - data cached for offline
[OfflineDB] 6912 construcciones guardadas para proyecto - construcciones cached
test_method: Playwright browser automation with page.context.set_offline(True/False) to simulate offline/online mode
